title: Is Keurig Dr Pepper A Better Pick Over This Food And Beverage Giant?
text: The shares of Keurig Dr Pepper currently trade at $39 per share, which is 38% above its pre-Covid level. On the other hand, shares of Mondelez International trade at $68 per share currently, which is only 18% above its pre-Covid level.

title: Consumer Staples May Foreshadow What's To Come In 2022
text: Consumer Staples May Foreshadow What's To Come In 2022

title: Brand Strength to Aid Keurig's (KDP) Growth Amid Supply Woes
text: Keurig (KDP) looks strong on gains across segments, with the Beverage Concentrates, Packaged Beverages and Latin America Beverages doing quite well. Its coffee business also witnesses momentum.

title: This Beverage Giant Seems Better Placed Compared To PepsiCo
text: The shares of PepsiCo currently trade at $174 per share, which is 22% above its pre-Covid levels. On the other hand, shares of Keurig Dr Pepper trade at $37 per share currently, which is 29% above its pre-Covid level.

title: 5 Soft Drink Stocks to Watch Despite Near-Term Industry Woes
text: The Beverages - Soft Drinks industry witnesses headwinds related to supply-chain disruptions and higher input costs. With innovative product introductions, KO, PEP, KDP, MNST and FMX look well poised.
